narrative:
Williamsfield Twp township has 930 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
